      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="40" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:40:2" style="left:226.45px;top:269.67px;width:4.1px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px">-</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="40" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:40:3" style="left:234.05px;top:269.67px;width:45.31px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:-0.9417px">410,000원원</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="41" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="공사착수일" data-template-run="1:41:1" style="left:37.11px;top:286.72px;width:65.5px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.5067px">2.공사착수일*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="42" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:42:1" style="left:158.43px;top:286.72px;width:52.27px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:0.1845px">2026-03-12</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="43" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="공사완료일" data-template-run="1:43:1" style="left:313.65px;top:286.72px;width:75.08px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.4898px">2-1.공사완료일*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="44" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:44:1" style="left:414.12px;top:286.72px;width:52.27px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:-0.2761px">2026-08-311</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="45" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="검사의 방법" data-template-run="1:45:1" style="left:37.11px;top:305.27px;width:69.04px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:2.0102px">3.검사의방법*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="46" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:46:1" style="left:158.43px;top:305.27px;width:130.63px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:2.438px">작업완료후도면및육안검사</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="47" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="검사의 시기" data-template-run="1:47:1" style="left:313.65px;top:305.27px;width:78.62px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.8588px">3-1.검사의시기*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="48" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:48:1" style="left:414.12px;top:305.27px;width:63.54px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:0.4962px">협력사요청시시</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="49" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="대금 지급방법" data-template-run="1:49:1" style="left:37.11px;top:323.82px;width:79.04px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.8644px">4.대금지급방법*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="50" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="계약" data-template-run="1:50:1" style="left:158.43px;top:323.82px;width:87.08px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:2.5538px">본계약조건과동일</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="51" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="대금 지급시기" data-template-run="1:51:1" style="left:313.65px;top:323.82px;width:88.62px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.7558px">4-1.대금지급시기*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="52" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:52:1" style="left:414.12px;top:323.82px;width:134.17px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.8097px">매월공사진행율에따라지급급</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="53" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="원재료 지급시 조건" data-template-run="1:53:1" style="left:37.11px;top:342.37px;width:102.58px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:2.1892px">5.원재료지급시조건*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="54" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:54:1" style="left:158.43px;top:342.37px;width:40px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:-0.8125px">해당없음음</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="55" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:55:1" style="left:37.11px;top:363.54px;width:108.33px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.2743px">6.공급원가변동에따른른</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="56" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="하도급 대금" data-template-run="1:56:1" style="left:37.11px;top:370.19px;width:91.33px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:2.2854px">하도급대금의조정*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="57" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="계약" data-template-run="1:57:1" style="left:158.43px;top:370.19px;width:156.69px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:1.5841px">본계약조건과동일(하도급법준수))</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="58" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:58:1" style="left:37.11px;top:396.52px;width:31.25px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:2.2604px">7.기타</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="59" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:59:1" style="left:158.43px;top:396.52px;width:322.11px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:2.0176px">1.작업방법은당사품질관리기준에준하여시공(작업전안전교육완료))</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="60" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:60:1" style="left:158.43px;top:409.82px;width:98.33px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.2877px">2.실물량정산기준임임</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="61" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:61:1" style="left:37.11px;top:426.81px;width:94.79px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:0.8915px">8.하도급대금연동에에</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="62" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:62:1" style="left:37.11px;top:433.46px;width:43.54px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:2.9769px">관한사항</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="63" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="계약" data-template-run="1:63:1" style="left:158.43px;top:433.46px;width:90.63px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:1.5963px">본계약조건과동일일</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="64" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:64:1" style="left:158.43px;top:457.1px;width:265.9px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.0876px">B1F피난안전구역,연결통로환기시설추가공사(26.3월).xlsxx</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="65" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:65:1" style="left:158.43px;top:470.4px;width:282.69px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.2662px">B1F피난안전구역,연결통호환기시설추가상세도(26.3월).dwgg</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="66" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="첨부파일" data-template-run="1:66:1" style="left:37.11px;top:477.05px;width:51.25px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:-0.0469px">9.첨부파일일</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="67" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:67:1" style="left:158.43px;top:483.7px;width:265.9px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.0876px">B1F피난안전구역,연결통로환기시설추가공사(26.3월).xlsxx</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="68" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:68:1" style="left:158.43px;top:497px;width:282.69px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.2662px">B1F피난안전구역,연결통호환기시설추가상세도(26.3월).dwgg</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="69" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:69:1" style="left:30.6px;top:511.8px;width:255px;height:11.97px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;line-height:11.97px;letter-spacing:2.3864px">○상기내용은진행,협의등상황에따라변동될수있습니다..</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="70" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="공사착수일" data-template-run="1:70:1" style="left:30.6px;top:528.36px;width:523.22px;height:11.97px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;line-height:11.97px;letter-spacing:1.9588px">○협력사에서는반드시전자서명완료후에작업에착수해주시기바랍니다(예정공사착수일이후서명시서명일이공사착수일)..</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="71" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="계약" data-template-run="1:71:1" style="left:30.6px;top:544.92px;width:515.53px;height:11.97px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;line-height:11.97px;letter-spacing:1.9852px">○향후수급사업자의귀책,기존계약범위에포함등의사유로추가/변경작업이아닌것으로객관적으로확인될경우본서면은은</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="72" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:72:1" style="left:30.6px;top:556.89px;width:46.97px;height:11.97px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;line-height:11.97px;letter-spacing:1.2002px">무효입니다.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <template data-template-semantic-layer="true">
<section data-template-extract-draft="true" data-template-clone="pdf-form-v20">
  <div class="template-clone template-clone--pdf-form-v20">
    <style>
      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 {
        width: 920px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        padding: 18px;
        background: #ffffff;
        color: #0f172a;
        font-family: "Malgun Gothic", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", sans-serif;
        line-height: 1.45;
      }

      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 h1 {
        margin: 0 0 12px;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      }

      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 table {
        width: 100%;
        border-collapse: collapse;
        table-layout: fixed;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 th,
      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 td {
        border: 1px solid #111827;
        padding: 6px 8px;
        font-size: 12px;
        vertical-align: top;
      }

      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 th {
        background: #f8fafc;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-align: center;
      }

      .template-clone__status-options {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 18px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .template-clone__check-option {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 4px;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__field-value,
      .template-clone__field-placeholder {
        min-height: 18px;
      }

      .template-clone__field-placeholder > span,
      .template-clone__value-line > span,
      .template-clone__value-item > span {
        display: inline-block;
        width: 100%;
        min-height: 14px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #94a3b8;
      }

      .template-clone__section-table .template-clone__section-heading {
        text-align: left;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
        font-weight: 700;
        background: #f8fafc;
      }

      .template-clone__section-table td {
        padding: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__value-line,
      .template-clone__value-item {
        min-height: 27px;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 6px 8px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
      }

      .template-clone__section-table tr:last-child .template-clone__value-line:last-child,
      .template-clone__section-table tr:last-child .template-clone__value-item:last-child {
        border-bottom: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__value-item::before {
        content: "• ";
      }

      .template-clone__section-label-stack {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 2px;
      }

      .template-clone__section-table .template-clone__section-value-cell--rowspan {
        vertical-align: top;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table {
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table td {
        padding: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__field-value {
        padding: 6px 8px;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__master-status-options {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 4px;
        padding: 6px 8px;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__status-option-row {
        display: flex;
        gap: 14px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__master-title-cell {
        padding: 6px 8px;
        min-height: 32px;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__master-body-label {
        text-align: left;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
        font-weight: 700;
        background: #f8fafc;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__master-body-value-cell {
        padding: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__workorder-grid {
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-block {
        display: grid;
        border-left: 1px solid #111827;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-block + .template-clone__grid-block {
        margin-top: -1px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-cell {
        border-top: 1px solid #111827;
        border-right: 1px solid #111827;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #111827;
        padding: 6px 8px;
        font-size: 12px;
        min-height: 27px;
        background: #ffffff;
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-cell--label {
        font-weight: 700;
        background: #f8fafc;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-cell--heading {
        font-weight: 700;
        background: #f8fafc;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-cell--title {
        min-height: 34px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-inline-label {
        font-weight: 700;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-inline-value > span,
      .template-clone__grid-inline-value[data-template-value],
      .template-clone__grid-multiline > span {
        display: inline-block;
        width: 100%;
        min-height: 14px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-status-options {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 4px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-status-option-row {
        display: flex;
        gap: 14px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .template-clone__footer-table td {
        font-size: 11px;
      }
    </style>
    <h1>작업지시서</h1>
    <div class="template-clone__workorder-grid">
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 81.09% 18.91%;">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;">양식명(코드) : <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value" data-template-value="양식명(코드)">작업지시서 (GMS-CPN-001)</span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;">문서번호 : <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value" data-template-value="양식 문서번호">2603-020593</span></div>
    </div>

            <p>○ 상기 내용은 진행, 협의 등 상황에 따라 변동 될 수 있습니다.</p>
            <p>○ 협력사에서는 반드시 전자서명 완료 후에 작업에 착수해 주시기 바랍니다(예정 공사착수일 이후 서명 시 서명일이 공사착수일).</p>

    <style>

        width: fit-content;

        position: relative;

      .template-clone__pdf-svg-text {
        fill: #111827;
        font-weight: 500;
        letter-spacing: -0.01em;
        paint-order: stroke fill;
        stroke: #111827;
        stroke-width: 0.28px;
        stroke-linejoin: round;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-svg-text--line-box {
        font-weight: 400;
        letter-spacing: 0;
        stroke-width: 0.08px;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-svg-text--clustered-line-box {
        letter-spacing: 0;
        stroke-width: 0.12px;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-svg-text--label {
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-html-layer {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        pointer-events: auto;
        user-select: text;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-html-page {
        position: relative;
        margin: 0 auto 16px;
        background: #ffffff;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-html-rule {
        position: absolute;
        display: block;
        background: #111827;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-html-text {
        position: absolute;
        display: block;
        white-space: pre;
        line-height: 1;
        color: #111827;
        transform-origin: left top;
        -webkit-text-stroke: 0.16px currentColor;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-html-text--label {
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-html-text--char {
        -webkit-text-stroke: 0.08px currentColor;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-html-text--run {
        transform: none;
        letter-spacing: 0;
        -webkit-text-stroke: 0.12px currentColor;
      }
    </style>

      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="30" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="공사 내용" data-template-run="1:30:1" style="left:37.11px;top:200.91px;width:66.12px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:3.5695px">1.공사내용*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="31" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:31:1" style="left:158.43px;top:200.91px;width:8.57px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:1.82px">1)</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="31" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:31:2" style="left:170.51px;top:200.91px;width:16.34px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:0.8731px">B1F</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="31" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:31:3" style="left:190.41px;top:200.91px;width:221.67px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:1.3555px">101,102동피난안전구역,연결통로환기시설시공공</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="32" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:32:1" style="left:158.43px;top:214.21px;width:170.31px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.6313px">2)전열교환기설치-급배기덕트시공공</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="33" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:33:1" style="left:158.43px;top:229.77px;width:60px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.0513px">*전열교환기::</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="34" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:34:1" style="left:161.97px;top:243.07px;width:60.96px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:0.6032px">250CMH(1대)</span>

      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="34" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:34:3" style="left:234.05px;top:243.07px;width:45.31px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:-1.1702px">240,000원원</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="35" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="하도급 대금" data-template-run="1:35:1" style="left:313.65px;top:243.07px;width:74.38px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:0.82px">1-2.하도급대금금</span>

      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="49" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="대금 지급방법" data-template-run="1:49:1" style="left:37.11px;top:323.82px;width:79.04px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.8644px">4.대금지급방법*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="50" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="계약" data-template-run="1:50:1" style="left:158.43px;top:323.82px;width:87.08px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:2.5538px">본계약조건과동일</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="51" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="대금 지급시기" data-template-run="1:51:1" style="left:313.65px;top:323.82px;width:88.62px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.7558px">4-1.대금지급시기*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="52" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:52:1" style="left:414.12px;top:323.82px;width:134.17px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.8097px">매월공사진행율에따라지급급</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="53" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="원재료 지급시 조건" data-template-run="1:53:1" style="left:37.11px;top:342.37px;width:102.58px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:2.1892px">5.원재료지급시조건*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="54" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:54:1" style="left:158.43px;top:342.37px;width:40px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:-0.8125px">해당없음음</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="55" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:55:1" style="left:37.11px;top:363.54px;width:108.33px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.2743px">6.공급원가변동에따른른</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="56" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="하도급 대금" data-template-run="1:56:1" style="left:37.11px;top:370.19px;width:91.33px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:2.2854px">하도급대금의조정*</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="57" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="계약" data-template-run="1:57:1" style="left:158.43px;top:370.19px;width:156.69px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:1.5841px">본계약조건과동일(하도급법준수))</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="58" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:58:1" style="left:37.11px;top:396.52px;width:31.25px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:2.2604px">7.기타</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="59" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:59:1" style="left:158.43px;top:396.52px;width:322.11px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:2.0176px">1.작업방법은당사품질관리기준에준하여시공(작업전안전교육완료))</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="60" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:60:1" style="left:158.43px;top:409.82px;width:98.33px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.2877px">2.실물량정산기준임임</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="61" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:61:1" style="left:37.11px;top:426.81px;width:94.79px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:0.8915px">8.하도급대금연동에에</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="62" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:62:1" style="left:37.11px;top:433.46px;width:43.54px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:2.9769px">관한사항</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="63" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="계약" data-template-run="1:63:1" style="left:158.43px;top:433.46px;width:90.63px;height:19.95px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:19.95px;letter-spacing:1.5963px">본계약조건과동일일</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="64" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:64:1" style="left:158.43px;top:457.1px;width:265.9px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.0876px">B1F피난안전구역,연결통로환기시설추가공사(26.3월).xlsxx</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="65" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:65:1" style="left:158.43px;top:470.4px;width:282.69px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.2662px">B1F피난안전구역,연결통호환기시설추가상세도(26.3월).dwgg</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="66" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="첨부파일" data-template-run="1:66:1" style="left:37.11px;top:477.05px;width:51.25px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:-0.0469px">9.첨부파일일</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="67" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:67:1" style="left:158.43px;top:483.7px;width:265.9px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.0876px">B1F피난안전구역,연결통로환기시설추가공사(26.3월).xlsxx</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="68" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:68:1" style="left:158.43px;top:497px;width:282.69px;height:13.3px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;line-height:13.30px;letter-spacing:1.2662px">B1F피난안전구역,연결통호환기시설추가상세도(26.3월).dwgg</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="69" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:69:1" style="left:30.6px;top:511.8px;width:255px;height:11.97px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;line-height:11.97px;letter-spacing:2.3864px">○상기내용은진행,협의등상황에따라변동될수있습니다..</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="70" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="공사착수일" data-template-run="1:70:1" style="left:30.6px;top:528.36px;width:523.22px;height:11.97px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;line-height:11.97px;letter-spacing:1.9588px">○협력사에서는반드시전자서명완료후에작업에착수해주시기바랍니다(예정공사착수일이후서명시서명일이공사착수일)..</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run template-clone__pdf-html-text--label" data-template-line="71" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="계약" data-template-run="1:71:1" style="left:30.6px;top:544.92px;width:515.53px;height:11.97px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont2;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;line-height:11.97px;letter-spacing:1.9852px">○향후수급사업자의귀책,기존계약범위에포함등의사유로추가/변경작업이아닌것으로객관적으로확인될경우본서면은은</span>
      <span class="template-clone__pdf-html-text template-clone__pdf-html-text--run" data-template-line="72" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-run="1:72:1" style="left:30.6px;top:556.89px;width:46.97px;height:11.97px;font-family:TemplateExtractPdfEmbeddedFont1;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;line-height:11.97px;letter-spacing:1.2002px">무효입니다.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <template data-template-semantic-layer="true">
<section data-template-extract-draft="true" data-template-clone="pdf-form-v20">
  <div class="template-clone template-clone--pdf-form-v20">
    <style>
      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 {
        width: 920px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        padding: 18px;
        background: #ffffff;
        color: #0f172a;
        font-family: "Malgun Gothic", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", sans-serif;
        line-height: 1.45;
      }

      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 h1 {
        margin: 0 0 12px;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      }

      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 table {
        width: 100%;
        border-collapse: collapse;
        table-layout: fixed;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 th,
      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 td {
        border: 1px solid #111827;
        padding: 6px 8px;
        font-size: 12px;
        vertical-align: top;
      }

      .template-clone--pdf-form-v20 th {
        background: #f8fafc;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-align: center;
      }

      .template-clone__status-options {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 18px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .template-clone__check-option {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 4px;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__field-value,
      .template-clone__field-placeholder {
        min-height: 18px;
      }

      .template-clone__field-placeholder > span,
      .template-clone__value-line > span,
      .template-clone__value-item > span {
        display: inline-block;
        width: 100%;
        min-height: 14px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #94a3b8;
      }

      .template-clone__section-table .template-clone__section-heading {
        text-align: left;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
        font-weight: 700;
        background: #f8fafc;
      }

      .template-clone__section-table td {
        padding: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__value-line,
      .template-clone__value-item {
        min-height: 27px;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 6px 8px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
      }

      .template-clone__section-table tr:last-child .template-clone__value-line:last-child,
      .template-clone__section-table tr:last-child .template-clone__value-item:last-child {
        border-bottom: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__value-item::before {
        content: "• ";
      }

      .template-clone__section-label-stack {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 2px;
      }

      .template-clone__section-table .template-clone__section-value-cell--rowspan {
        vertical-align: top;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table {
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table td {
        padding: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__field-value {
        padding: 6px 8px;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__master-status-options {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 4px;
        padding: 6px 8px;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__status-option-row {
        display: flex;
        gap: 14px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__master-title-cell {
        padding: 6px 8px;
        min-height: 32px;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__master-body-label {
        text-align: left;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
        font-weight: 700;
        background: #f8fafc;
      }

      .template-clone__master-table .template-clone__master-body-value-cell {
        padding: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__workorder-grid {
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-block {
        display: grid;
        border-left: 1px solid #111827;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-block + .template-clone__grid-block {
        margin-top: -1px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-cell {
        border-top: 1px solid #111827;
        border-right: 1px solid #111827;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #111827;
        padding: 6px 8px;
        font-size: 12px;
        min-height: 27px;
        background: #ffffff;
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-cell--label {
        font-weight: 700;
        background: #f8fafc;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-cell--heading {
        font-weight: 700;
        background: #f8fafc;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-cell--title {
        min-height: 34px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-inline-label {
        font-weight: 700;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-inline-value > span,
      .template-clone__grid-inline-value[data-template-value],
      .template-clone__grid-multiline > span {
        display: inline-block;
        width: 100%;
        min-height: 14px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-status-options {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 4px;
      }

      .template-clone__grid-status-option-row {
        display: flex;
        gap: 14px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .template-clone__footer-table td {
        font-size: 11px;
      }
    </style>
    <h1>작업지시서</h1>
    <div class="template-clone__workorder-grid">
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 81.09% 18.91%;">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;">양식명(코드) : <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="form_template_code" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;">문서번호 : <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="form_document_number" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 17.26% 26.69% 56.05%; grid-template-rows: repeat(4, minmax(28px, auto));">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--label" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 4;">구 분</div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 4;"><div class="template-clone__grid-status-options">
      <div class="template-clone__grid-status-option-row">
        <span class="template-clone__check-option">□ 신규</span>
        <span class="template-clone__check-option">□ 재발급</span>
      </div>
      <div class="template-clone__grid-status-option-row">
        <span class="template-clone__check-option">□ Off-Line등록</span>
      </div>
    </div></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 3 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;">CAE <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="manager_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="field_4" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 3 / span 1; grid-row: 2 / span 1;">CE <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="ce_assignee_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="ce_processed_at" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 3 / span 1; grid-row: 3 / span 1;">CAM <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="manager_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="field_8" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 3 / span 1; grid-row: 4 / span 1;">PM <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="pm_assignee_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="pm_processed_at" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 35.11% 64.89%;">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><span class="template-clone__grid-inline-label">작 성 자</span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="writer_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 35.11% 32.70% 32.20%;">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><span class="template-clone__grid-inline-label">문 서 번 호</span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="document_number" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><span class="template-clone__grid-inline-label">발 급 일</span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="issue_date" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 3 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><span class="template-clone__grid-inline-label">협력사승인일</span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="partner_approval_date" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 67.80% 32.20%;">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><span class="template-clone__grid-inline-label">프 로 젝 트</span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="project_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><span class="template-clone__grid-inline-label">발 급 자</span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="issuer_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 67.80% 32.20%;">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><span class="template-clone__grid-inline-label">계 약</span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="contract_scope" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><span class="template-clone__grid-inline-label">접 수 자</span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="receiver_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 51.65% 48.35%;">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;">발급자 서명 <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="issuer_signer_name" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span> <span class="template-clone__grid-inline-value"><span data-label="issuer_signature_status" data-template-placeholder="inline"></span></span></div>

    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 23.94% 76.06%; grid-template-rows: repeat(2, minmax(28px, auto));">

    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 23.94% 29.08% 18.82% 28.16%; grid-template-rows: repeat(1, minmax(28px, auto));">

    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 23.94% 76.06%; grid-template-rows: repeat(1, minmax(28px, auto));">

    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 23.94% 76.06%; grid-template-rows: repeat(2, minmax(28px, auto));">

    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 23.94% 76.06%; grid-template-rows: repeat(1, minmax(28px, auto));">

    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 23.94% 76.06%; grid-template-rows: repeat(4, minmax(28px, auto));">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--heading" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 4;">9. 첨부파일</div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><p class="template-clone__value-item template-clone__placeholder-item"><span data-label="attachment_list" data-template-placeholder="list-item"></span></p></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 2 / span 1;"><p class="template-clone__value-item template-clone__placeholder-item"><span data-label="attachment_list" data-template-placeholder="list-item"></span></p></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 3 / span 1;"><p class="template-clone__value-item template-clone__placeholder-item"><span data-label="attachment_list" data-template-placeholder="list-item"></span></p></div>
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1; grid-row: 4 / span 1;"><p class="template-clone__value-item template-clone__placeholder-item"><span data-label="attachment_list" data-template-placeholder="list-item"></span></p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="template-clone__grid-block" style="grid-template-columns: 100.00%;">
<div class="template-clone__grid-cell template-clone__grid-cell--value" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1; grid-row: 1 / span 1;"><p>○ 상기 내용은 진행, 협의 등 상황에 따라 변동 될 수 있습니다.</p><p>○ 협력사에서는 반드시 전자서명 완료 후에 작업에 착수해 주시기 바랍니다(예정 공사착수일 이후 서명 시 서명일이 공사착수일).</p><p>○ 향후 수급사업자의 귀책, 기존 계약범위에 포함 등의 사유로 추가/변경작업이 아닌 것으로 객관적으로 확인될 경우 본 서면은 무효입니다.</p></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <table class="template-clone__footer-table">
      <tbody>
        <tr>
          <td>
            <p>○ 상기 내용은 진행, 협의 등 상황에 따라 변동 될 수 있습니다.</p>
            <p>○ 협력사에서는 반드시 전자서명 완료 후에 작업에 착수해 주시기 바랍니다(예정 공사착수일 이후 서명 시 서명일이 공사착수일).</p>
            <p>○ 향후 수급사업자의 귀책, 기존 계약범위에 포함 등의 사유로 추가/변경작업이 아닌 것으로 객관적으로 확인될 경우 본 서면은 무효입니다.</p>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</section>
  </template>
</section>
```
